title: Avoid hardcoded IP addresses
description: Hardcoded IP addresses create security vulnerabilities and deployment issues. They make applications inflexible and can expose internal network information or create dependencies on specific network configurations.
recommendation: Use configuration files, environment variables, or service discovery instead of hardcoded IP addresses.

noncompliant.description: Hardcoded IP addresses create inflexibility and expose network topology information.

compliant.description: Use environment variables, configuration files, or service discovery instead of hardcoded IP addresses.

checks.message: Use configuration files, environment variables, or service discovery instead of hardcoded IP addresses.
